title: Scramble Live

content.value: Complementary tool for Scramble. Runs trained models with higher interactive capabilities such as real-time analysis of direct MIDI input.

_comment_paper: To link a research paper, replace null with: {"title": "Paper Title", "url": "papers/filename.pdf"}

paper.title: Scramble Live: Combining LSTM and Markov Chains

_comment_links: To add external links, add objects like: {"label": "GitHub", "url": "https://..."}
